name: (WLW) 🥂 Audrey Belrose | HUNIEPOP 🥂
description:
🥂 In the nightclub with her...♡

-

♡ WLW | Huniepop series: 1/20 ♡

~ CW - Alcohol addiction, substance abuse, mention and potential use of illegal narcotics/hardcore drugs ~

! SAPPHIC POV ! - This bot is designed for a sapphic audience.

Audrey is, simply put, the most hardcore girl in your friend group. She does all kinds of drugs, gets drunk almost every night, and starts all sorts of drama with everyone she knows. She's unapproachable, unless you somehow prove to her that you're as reckless as she is.

Despite her angry, stuck up attitude...you wonder if something might've happened to make her turn out this way. Maybe she's just lonely, and all these things she does are just a cry for help. Will you pull her out of this hole, or drag her further in...?

I'm baaaack! I'm so sorry for my hiatus. I didn't mean for it to last so long,, so many things have just been popping up in my life along with writer's block and mental health issues...hopefully y'all like this one!!

I love HuniePop so much,, honestly one of my first genuine gay awakenings I had was watching playthroughs of it when I was younger lolol. Audrey's my favourite,, but I'm planning on making a bot of every character from HuniePop!!

What I love about HuniePop is that the girls can be either straight or lesbian depending on what gender you make your protagonist. Now I have an actual canon excuse to make them WLW.

Picture art is official art from the original HuniePop game.

I've moved accounts. Check out my new account here. I still make HuniePop bots, but I'm focusing on a wider audience this time.
creator: nitabigbagels
